query: backlit silhouette obscured anonymous figure against bright window subject in shadow
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: backlit silhouette — anonymous figures, identity erased by exposure choice, sinister window-light contrejour

response.objective_caption: A person walks away from the viewer down an interior corridor to the right of a large dark vertical structure. In the lower left foreground, a stack of papers sits on a surface beside a brightly illuminated window. Small colorful lights are visible in the distance at the end of the corridor.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: The image employs intentional blur to render a figure walking down a corridor as a soft, indistinct shape, while a massive dark vertical obstruction blocks and partially hides the subject near the frame's edge. A stack of papers sits in the lower left beside a bright window. The palette is heavily desaturated and muted, contributing to an oppressive, melancholic atmosphere of urban isolation and atmospheric distress.
